name: GT-hyp
source: PROPOSITION HYPOTHESES (prop-direct-sum, registry contract — the antecedent of the implication, given data not derived; this external carries no refs quote, skip_noquote). (E5 DIRECT-SUM MAX NORM) B = direct sum over r=1..m of unital JB-algebras B_r, with coordinatewise Jordan product, and the order-unit norm on B is the maximum of the factor norms: ||x|| = max_r ||x_r|| (written into the contract as "order-unit norm = max_r"; this is a defining hypothesis of the statement, NOT a general HOS theorem). (E6 PER-FACTOR SPLITTINGS) each factor B_r carries an exact-adjoint coboundary splitting S_r: im(d^1_{B_r}) -> C^1(B_r,B_r) in the adjoint module, with d^1_{B_r} S_r g = g for all g and ||S_r g|| <= K_r ||g|| in the injective order-unit cochain norm; set K = max_r K_r. (MODULE RESTRICTION) all modules are adjoint / block-respecting: the action is left Jordan multiplication, so the central unit e_r acts as the identity on its own block B_r (no Peirce-1/2 mixing); arbitrary modules are excluded.
